user_stories.title: Entity Extraction
user_stories.so_that: I can identify who and what is being discussed beyond simple text matching.
acceptance_criteria: Use an LLM to scan chunks and identify entities: Guests, Comparies, Frameworks, Books, Tools.
Store unique entities in a `GraphNodes` table.

user_stories.title: Relationship Mapping
user_stories.so_that: I can build a connected graph of knowledge.
acceptance_criteria: Store edges in a `GraphEdges` table (source_node_id, target_node_id, relationship_type, metadata).
Link entities back to the specific `TranscriptChunk` where the relationship was found.
